{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Archmage of ice elementalism
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Laraena]] is an [[Archmage of ice elementalism]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|There exists a concept of an [[Archmage of ice elementalism]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
